description: First-pass forbidden or discouraged naming knowledge for ChineseNameAI. These rules are used to avoid names that sound awkward, outdated, risky, or unnatural.

forbiddenCharacters.reason: Directly associated with illness.
Directly associated with death.
Associated with death, loss, and disappearance.
Associated with disaster.
Associated with misfortune and trouble.
Means ugly or unattractive in common usage.
Means foolish or silly in a negative way.
Means stupid or clumsy.
Means bad or broken.
Associated with poison and harm.
Associated with demons or dark fantasy; unsuitable for a real personal name.
Associated with ghosts; usually awkward in personal names.
Usable as a surname, but risky as a given-name character because it can sound boastful or strange.
Imperial and overly grandiose for modern personal names.
Imperial, arrogant, or fantasy-coded in modern naming.
Aggressive and domination-oriented; often feels like a game username.
Religious or boastful depending on context; rarely natural in modern names.
Can feel fantasy-like, overly delicate, or internet-coded.
Directly means wealth; can sound old-fashioned or blunt.
Directly means noble or expensive; can sound old-fashioned or status-seeking.
Directly associated with money; feels commercial rather than personal.
Can sound dated or overly flashy in many modern names.
Often feels old-fashioned in contemporary given names.
Common in older generations; may feel dated for a modern user.
Can feel dated unless carefully paired.
Usable but blunt; can sound older or overly forceful if not paired carefully.

outdatedNames.name: 建国
outdatedNames.reason: Strongly associated with an older historical naming style.

outdatedNames.name: 国庆
outdatedNames.reason: Feels dated and tied to a political-era naming convention.

outdatedNames.name: 援朝
outdatedNames.reason: Historical and political association; not suitable for a modern foreign user.

outdatedNames.name: 秀英
outdatedNames.reason: Traditional and common among older generations; may feel dated.

outdatedNames.name: 桂花
outdatedNames.reason: Can sound rural or old-fashioned for a modern adult user.

outdatedNames.name: 翠花
outdatedNames.reason: Often used jokingly or as an old-fashioned stereotype.

outdatedNames.name: 淑芬
outdatedNames.reason: Older-generation feminine name; not ideal for modern positioning.

outdatedNames.name: 小红
outdatedNames.reason: Too generic and textbook-like; not suitable as a serious recommendation.

outdatedNames.name: 小明
outdatedNames.reason: Classic textbook placeholder name; acceptable only as a nickname example, not a recommendation.

outdatedNames.name: 大壮
outdatedNames.reason: Rural, cartoonish, or nickname-like; not suitable for a polished Chinese name.

outdatedNames.name: 铁柱
outdatedNames.reason: Strongly rustic and comedic in modern context.

outdatedNames.name: 狗蛋
outdatedNames.reason: Comic/rustic nickname, not a proper modern name.

outdatedNames.name: 招财
outdatedNames.reason: Sounds like a pet name or fortune phrase rather than a real personal name.

discouragedPatterns.reason: Can sound arrogant, fantasy-coded, or like an online handle.
Reads like a foreign-name transcription, not a real Chinese name.
Sounds like a username, fiction character, or meme rather than a real person.
